scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:backend: sh -c 'BACKEND_ENCRYPTION_KEY=${BACKEND_ENCRYPTION_KEY:-0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef} NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV:-development} PORT=${PORT:-4000} ALLOWED_ORIGINS=${ALLOWED_ORIGINS:-http://localhost:5173} nodemon --watch backend --ext js,json --ignore backend/data --exec "node backend/index.js"'
